ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source (e.g., Electricity, Natural Gas) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy source */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the energy source */,
  "cost_per_unit" REAL /* Cost per unit of the energy source */,
  "is_renewable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the energy source is renewable */,
  "emission_factor" REAL /* Emission factor (CO2 equivalent per unit) of the energy source */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the energy source (e.g., fossil, renewable, nuclear) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source being produced */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (1-24) */,
  "quantity_produced" REAL /* Quantity of energy produced during the hour */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the production record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production facility */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the production (e.g., active, paused, maintenance) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumption record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source being consumed */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (1-24) */,
  "quantity_consumed" REAL /* Quantity of energy consumed during the hour */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the consumption record */,
  "consumer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the consumer (e.g., a specific department or customer) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the consumption (e.g., active, paused) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the consumption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source being sold */,
  "quantity_sold" REAL /* Quantity of energy sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price per unit of energy sold */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sale (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_sales_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., energy analyst, production manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object representing the user's permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "target_quantity" REAL /* Target quantity of energy to be produced */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Date by which the target must be met */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production facility */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the target (e.g., active, achieved, missed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_targets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id")
)
